'''nazhanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocote|jocote]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocote|jocote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nazhanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhængæth|næzhængæth]] || [[word:næzhængæj|næzhængæj]] || [[word:næzhængæsh|næzhængæsh]] || [[word:næzhængæ|næzhængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhazhangath|nazhazhangath]] || [[word:nazhazhangaj|nazhazhangaj]] || [[word:nazhazhangash|nazhazhangash]] || [[word:nazhazhanga|nazhazhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhangath|nazhangath]] || [[word:nazhangaj|nazhangaj]] || [[word:nazhangash|nazhangash]] || [[word:nazhanga|nazhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhafngath|nazhafngath]] || [[word:nazhafngaj|nazhafngaj]] || [[word:nazhafngash|nazhafngash]] || [[word:nazhafngaf|nazhafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhangatha|nazhangatha]] || [[word:nazhangaja|nazhangaja]] || [[word:nazhangasha|nazhangasha]] || [[word:nazhangaka|nazhangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhangath|nazhangath]] || [[word:nazhangaj|nazhangaj]] || [[word:nazhangash|nazhangash]] || [[word:nazhanga|nazhanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhangathal|nazhangathal]] || [[word:nazhangajal|nazhangajal]] || [[word:nazhangashal|nazhangashal]] || [[word:nazhangakal|nazhangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhangathatha|nazhangathatha]] || [[word:nazhangajaja|nazhangajaja]] || [[word:nazhangashasha|nazhangashasha]] || [[word:nazhangaka|nazhangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhangathan|nazhangathan]] || [[word:nazhangajan|nazhangajan]] || [[word:nazhangashan|nazhangashan]] || [[word:nazhangakan|nazhangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhangathaoro|nazhangathaoro]] || [[word:nazhangajaoro|nazhangajaoro]] || [[word:nazhangashaoro|nazhangashaoro]] || [[word:nazhangakaoro|nazhangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
